channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipped builders rubble, 18th April
item.description:
Van load of builders rubbled tipped in the middle arch of Rail Sidings rd causing obstruction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Rail Sidings Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light is day burning, 18th April
item.description:
Outside The Rising Sun pub 120 Loampit Vale. Street light column 2 is day burning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Loampit Vale, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged drain cover, 18th April
item.description:
The cover is damaged with large holes and the metal in the middle is only attached on one side and can be pushed inwards by hand - someone with a walking stick or in heels could get stuck or hurt walking over it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page Heath Villas, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light is day birnkng, 18th April
item.description:
Outside no 18 Loampit vale Street light column 16 is day burning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Loampit Hill, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, 18th April
item.description:
Fly tipping of a mattress at corner of archangel and timber pond

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Archangel Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars parked illegally on pavement, 18th April
item.description:
Cars parked on pavement near bus stop on bridge road 2 house down on the right are having a psrty so they are parking the cars everywher and anywhere should be nicked we cant do it and get away with it although we live gere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bridge Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streatley Park corner and Burton St, 18th April
item.description:
Dumped building materials.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag (Parks)

item.title: Several foot long pothole and other smaller ones, 18th April
item.description:
Along the entire road from the mini roundabout to the top of the hill there are deep potholes everywhere including two long ones at least several feet long that is unavoidable as it hits both front tires
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kicking football on my window, 18th April
item.description:
Please could you investigate and resolve the situation of children playing football in the grass area behind my home and always kicking the football against my windows and walls. This is becoming so frustrating to me as I get no peace at my home
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Loddiges Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inappropriate location, 18th April
item.description:
This bicycle is chained in an inappropriate location; it is attracting burglars, as some were attempting to steal the tires.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lebrun Square, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped wood needs removing, 18th April
item.description:
Derby Road east side Dumped wood needs removing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Derby Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish needs removal, 18th April
item.description:
Handley Road east and west sides near junction with Victoria Park Road. Dumped rubbish needs removing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and furniture dumped on Ash grove and richborough road, 18th April
item.description:
Rubbish and furniture dumped on Ash grove and richborough road please clean

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricklewood Broadway, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Foul smelling bag, 18th April
item.description:
Not sure what this is but the stench is awful from this bag and has been there a couple of days now. Please remove asap and disinfect the area. Kids were playing near by tonight, it's awful.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180-182, Clevedon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The abodoned Jeep is hiding some much rubbish inc glass and the bin men can’t get in the bin to clean this up, 18th April
item.description:
So much rubbish being dumped mathyesses glass etc Bins can’t be opened due to keep having been there since Xmas

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deverell Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking parking bays, 18th April
item.description:
Pictures taken 18/04/2026 @ 06:56 - speaks for itself, total lack of consideration for other road users

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty road signs, 18th April
item.description:
All the road signs including the 30 mph speed limit sign and directions onto the A20 from just past the Tesco entrance need cleaning. They are extremely dirty and some are near unreadable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edgington Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge unattended for 9 months, 18th April
item.description:
This fridge had been here for 9 months. It seems to be outside a garage. It was here when we viewed our house in july and is still here now we have moved in. There is also litter spillage.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parkdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several dumped items, 18th April
item.description:
Multiple fly-tipped items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gladstone Mews, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nearside southbound head facing 90° wrong way & damaged, 18th April
item.description:
St Pancras Way / Agar Grove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Randolph Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction
